3273900.name: Reindeer Racing
3273900.description:
Reindeer Racing is a quirky and casual racing game where you race against up to 8 players worldwide. Sabotage the environment to cross your opponents, throw snowballs or ram into objects to trigger these traps.

You are a reindeer racer in a no-holds-barred race in the cold north, which means you will have to do anything to get ahead of your opponents on the track and win the race, even if it means playing dirty.

Race

  • Easy to learn, fun to master: Jump into the game whenever you want, and master along the way.

  • Chaotic, fast-paced gameplay: There is always something going on, and something to do on the track, whether it is navigating dangerous roads, setting traps for opponents or clashing with other racers.

  • Quirky controls: Control the chaotic and unruly reindeer that pull your sled through the harsh conditions of the cold north.

Sabotage

  • Dynamic environment: Interact with the environment around the track to give yourself an advantage in the race. This could be through traps, obstacles or secret routes.

  • Variety of sabotaging: Activate traps in the environment by hitting them or throwing snowballs at them. These can be falling icicles, exploding tree trunks or even large snowballs.

Multiplayer

  • Play with friends: Play against your friends with up to 8 players.

Note

This game was made as a school project by a group of 7 students from Kajaani University of Applied Sciences, Finland.
